acquisition method: working in the regime of data-dependent MS to MS/MS switch.
alkylation reagent: blocked with 200 mM MMTS (10mM) for 10 min at room temperature
alkylation concentration: blocked with 200 mM MMTS (10mM) for 10 min at room temperature
cleavage agent: digested overnight with 10 µl 0.1 µg/µl trypsin.
instrument: coupled directly to the ion source of the Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer.
labeling: The mass spectrometry analysis was performed at the Mass Spectrometry Laboratory IBB PAN.
reduction reagent: reduced with 0.5 M (5 mM) TCEP for 1 h at 60 °C.
reduction concentration: reduced with 0.5 M (5 mM) TCEP for 1 h at 60 °C.
